- Angled Phone Stand - Minimalist 3D Printed Smartphone Holder: This angled phone stand is a sleek and practical 3D printable accessory designed to hold your smartphone at the perfect viewing angle. Whether you're working, video calling, or watching content hands-free, this minimalist stand provides reliable support and a clean look on any desk or nightstand.
- Amazon.com: Adjustable Cell Phone Stand, Angle Height Adjustable ...: Adjustable Height & Angle ell phone stand holder is in accordance with ergonomic design. The height can be easily adjusted between 2.4 - 5.5 inches, The adjustable angle between 0°-72° with comfortable viewing angle which helps to fix your posture and reduce neck & back strain.

build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(60, 80, 8)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(5).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=8).rect(40, 60).extrude(10)

STEP 4: Create slot for phone — .faces("<Z").workplane(centered=True).lineTo(-20, -25).lineTo(20, -25).close().cutThruAll()

STEP 5: Add rubber feet holes — .faces(">Z").workplane(offset=8).circle(3).extrude(1)
